[[/6...d5|6...d5 - only move]]|=}}Black has to do something about the attack by the White bishop and knight on f7. The bishop's diagonal must be blocked at the cost of a pawn with [[Chess Opening Theory/1. e4/1...e5/2. f4/2...exf4/3. Nf3/3...g5/4. h4/4...g4/5. Ne5/5...Nf6/6. Bc4/6...d5|'''6...d5''']].{{wikipedia|King's Gambit}}{{Chess Opening Theory/Footer}}
